name: and-then-next-suggestion
description: Model-agnostic tab autocomplete for VS Code
author: EstebanForge

commands.title: And Then Next Suggestion: Trigger Suggestion
And Then Next Suggestion: Open Settings
And Then Next Suggestion: Set API Key
And Then Next Suggestion: Show Extension Logs
And Then Next Suggestion: Switch Provider Profile
And Then Next Suggestion: Explain Selected Code

andThenNextSuggestion.activeProfile.markdownDescription: The ID of the currently active provider profile. [Click here to select a profile from the dropdown](command:andThenNextSuggestion.switchProvider).

andThenNextSuggestion.requestTimeout.description: Maximum time (in seconds) to wait for a completion response before aborting.

disableThinking.description: Disable 'thinking' or 'reasoning' for models that support it (e.g., DeepSeek R1).

supportsThinking.description: Whether this model supports 'thinking' or 'reasoning' params (e.g., o1, o3, deepseek-reasoner). Leave unset to auto-detect by model name.

andThenNextSuggestion.disableCopilotAuto.markdownDescription: Disable GitHub Copilot's tab autocomplete (inline suggestions) to prevent conflicts with other tab completion models. This keeps Copilot Chat and other features enabled. [Configure Copilot settings manually](command:workbench.action.openSettings?%5B%22github.copilot.inlineSuggest.enable%22%5D)

andThenNextSuggestion.debounceMs.markdownDescription:
Delay (in milliseconds) after the last keystroke before a suggestion is requested. Acts as a coalescing window: typing within it resets the timer, so only the final state triggers a request. Default `200`.

- **Lower** (e.g. `100`): suggestions appear sooner during brief pauses, but bursty typing fires more requests (each cancelled by the next keystroke). Risks hitting provider rate limits or extra cost on metered/per-request APIs.
- **Higher** (e.g. `400`): fewer requests, gentler on rate-limited or metered providers. Suggestions feel less immediate during deliberate typing.

If unsure, leave at `200`. For strict per-request providers, prefer `andThenNextSuggestion.rateLimitMs`, which enforces a hard floor independent of typing speed.

andThenNextSuggestion.rateLimitMs.markdownDescription: Minimum delay (in milliseconds) between any two API requests, shared across both inline completions and the Explain command. Set to `0` to disable. This is a hard rate-limit floor that complements the 300ms debounce; useful for providers with strict request limits. Example: `500` enforces at most one request every half second.
